steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Add the two equations. The $y$ terms cancel, leaving $11x = 8$, so $x = 8/11$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches Choice D — $32$, $32$, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore D.
